data$BMI <- as.numeric(data$BMI)
data$Diagnosis <- as.factor(data$Diagnosis)

Menghitung missing value

data.frame(Jumlah_missing= colSums(is.na(data)))

Menghitung duplikat

duplikat = sum(duplicated(data))
print(paste("Jumlah duplikat =", duplikat))
## [1] "Jumlah duplikat = 0"
# Cek jumlah NaN
sum(is.nan(unlist(data)))
## [1] 0
# Cek jumlah NA
sum(is.na(data))
## [1] 14008
#Cek data kosong
sum(data == "", na.rm = TRUE)
## [1] 0
data[data == ""] <- NA

Imputasi variabel numerik dengan median dan variabel kategorik dengan modus

# fungsi modus
get_mode <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  ux <- unique(x)
  ux[which.max(tabulate(match(x, ux)))]
}

# loop imputasi
for(col in names(data)){
  
  if(is.numeric(data[[col]])){ 
    # imputasi median untuk numerik
    data[[col]][is.na(data[[col]])] <- median(data[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
    
  } else {
    # imputasi modus untuk kategorik
    data[[col]][is.na(data[[col]])] <- get_mode(data[[col]])
    
  }
}

library(dplyr)
## Warning: package 'dplyr' was built under R version 4.4.3
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
data <- data %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric),   ~ ifelse(is.na(.), median(., na.rm = TRUE), .))) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), get_mode(.), .)))

data
print(paste("Total missing values after imputation:", sum(is.na(data))))
## [1] "Total missing values after imputation: 0"
# Cek jumlah NaN
sum(is.nan(unlist(data)))
## [1] 0
# Cek jumlah NA
sum(is.na(data))
## [1] 0

Split Data Train dan Data Test

set.seed(42)

index <- sample(1:nrow(data), 0.8 * nrow(data))

data_train <- data[index, ]
data_test  <- data[-index, ]


cat("data_train shape:", dim(data_train), "\n")
## data_train shape: 625 58
cat("data_test shape:", dim(data_test), "\n")
## data_test shape: 157 58
# copy data dulu
data_faktor <- data

# cari kolom numerik
num_cols <- sapply(data_faktor, is.numeric)

# lakukan diskretisasi pada data_faktor saja
data_faktor[num_cols] <- lapply(data_faktor[num_cols], function(x){
  cut(x,
      breaks = 5,
      labels = c("very_low","low","medium","high","very_high"))
})
entropy <- function(target){
  p <- table(target)/length(target)
  p <- p[p > 0]   # buang probabilitas 0
  -sum(p * log2(p))
}

information_gain <- function(data_faktor, atribut, target){
  ED <- entropy(data_faktor[[target]])
  nilai <- unique(data_faktor[[atribut]])
  weighted_entropy <- 0
  
  for(i in nilai){
    subset <- data_faktor[data_faktor[[atribut]] == i, ]
    Dv <- nrow(subset)
    D <- nrow(data_faktor)
    
    weighted_entropy <- weighted_entropy + (Dv/D) * entropy(subset[[target]])
  }
  
  IG <- ED - weighted_entropy
  
  return(IG)
}

target <- "Diagnosis"
target_lain <- c(
"Severity",
"Management", 
"US_Number", 
"Diagnosis_Presumptive"
)

atribut <- names(data_faktor)
atribut <- atribut[!atribut %in% c(target, target_lain)]
ig_values <- c()

for(a in atribut){
  ig_values[a] <- information_gain(data_faktor, a, target)
}
ig_values

##                     1.229104e-02
ig_sorted <- sort(ig_values, decreasing = TRUE)
hasil <- data.frame(
  Information_Gain = ig_sorted
)

hasil
top_vars <- names(ig_sorted)[1:7]
top_vars
## [1] "Appendix_Diameter"             "Appendix_on_US"               
## [3] "Alvarado_Score"                "Peritonitis"                  
## [5] "WBC_Count"                     "Length_of_Stay"               
## [7] "Paedriatic_Appendicitis_Score"
data_tree <- data[, c(top_vars, "Diagnosis")]

library(rpart)

model <- rpart(
  Diagnosis ~ ., 
  data = data_tree,
  method = "class"
)

summary(model)

library(rpart.plot)
## Warning: package 'rpart.plot' was built under R version 4.4.3
rpart.plot(model)

# =========================
# 9️⃣ Evaluasi Model Train dan Test
# =========================

# Prediksi Train
train_pred <- predict(model, newdata=data_train, type="class")

# Prediksi Test
test_pred <- predict(model, newdata=data_test, type="class")

# Hitung akurasi
train_acc <- mean(train_pred == data_train$Diagnosis)
test_acc  <- mean(test_pred == data_test$Diagnosis)

cat(sprintf("Akurasi Train: %.4f\n", train_acc))
## Akurasi Train: 0.9360
cat(sprintf("Akurasi Test : %.4f\n", test_acc))
## Akurasi Test : 0.9236
# =========================
# 1️⃣0️⃣ Cek Overfitting atau Underfitting
# =========================
acc_diff <- train_acc - test_acc
cat(sprintf("Selisih Akurasi (Train - Test): %.4f\n", acc_diff))
## Selisih Akurasi (Train - Test): 0.0124
if(acc_diff > 0.1){
  cat("Model kemungkinan mengalami OVERFITTING (akurasi train jauh lebih tinggi).\n")
} else if(acc_diff < -0.1){
  cat("Model kemungkinan mengalami UNDERFITTING (akurasi test lebih tinggi, tidak umum).\n")
} else {
  cat("Model memiliki generalisasi yang baik (selisih akurasi kecil).\n")
}
## Model memiliki generalisasi yang baik (selisih akurasi kecil).
